subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto Thee, O God of all worlds and Ultimate Desire of them that know Thee, inasmuch as Thou hast caused stars to dawn forth from the horizons of the heaven of Thy Book [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: لک الحمد یا اله العالمین و مقصود العارفین بما اشرقت من آفاق سماء کتابک انجم
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for purity; chastity, @prayer for nearness to God, @law of fasting, @praise and encouragement
